title: ErrorBoundary
description: Catches errors thrown in child components and renders a fallback.
signature: ErrorBoundary(props: { fallback: MaybeAccessor<CReactNode> | ((err: any, reset: () => void) => CReactNode); children: MaybeAccessor<CReactNode> }): JSXElement
prop_fallback_desc: Static fallback or render function called with the caught error and a reset function.
prop_children_desc: Content to render. Errors in this subtree are caught.
